analysis.personalizeTitle: Get personalized warnings for your pet
analysis.personalizeDesc: Add your pet’s breed, age, and health conditions for tailored safety alerts.

grade.verdictA: Our analysis considers this food to have excellent ingredient quality.
grade.verdictB: Our analysis considers this food to have good ingredient quality.
grade.verdictC: Our analysis finds average ingredient quality. Some ingredients are flagged for review.
grade.verdictD: Our analysis flags several ingredients for review. Consult your veterinarian for personalized advice.
grade.verdictF: Our analysis flags {harmfulCount} ingredient(s) for review. We recommend consulting your veterinarian.

legal.disclaimer: Grades are algorithmic assessments for reference only, not veterinary or regulatory evaluations. Consult your veterinarian before making dietary changes.
legal.natureOfServiceBody: ToxicPaw provides algorithmic ingredient analysis for educational and informational purposes only. Grades and ratings are generated by automated algorithms and do not constitute veterinary advice, regulatory assessments, or product safety certifications.
legal.notVetAdviceBody: Information provided should not replace professional veterinary consultation. Always consult a licensed veterinarian before making changes to your pet’s diet.
legal.analysisLimitationsBody: Our ingredient database reflects general nutritional perspectives. Individual ingredients may be FDA/AAFCO approved and safe at regulated levels. Our flagging system reflects algorithmic categorization, not definitive safety determinations. Factors such as manufacturing quality, bioavailability, and individual pet health conditions are not evaluated.
legal.brandRatingsBody: Brand grades are based solely on ingredient composition analysis. They do not evaluate manufacturing standards, quality control, recall history, or regulatory compliance. A low grade does not indicate that a product is unsafe or unsuitable for your pet. Many products with lower algorithmic grades are recommended by veterinarians for specific health conditions.
legal.noLiabilityBody: ToxicPaw and its creators assume no liability for decisions made based on information provided by this service.
legal.disputeProcessBody: If you represent a brand and believe our analysis contains errors, please contact us at legal@toxicpaw.com.
